summary: The user sought assistance in organizing their movie watching history and decided to create a spreadsheet to track their movie data. They discussed various columns to include, such as movie title, release year, watch date, and additional categories like type and platform, ultimately finalizing a comprehensive template for their tracking needs.
facts: The user watched all 22 Marvel Cinematic Universe movies in two weeks. The user plans to use a spreadsheet to track their movie watching history. The user will add a column for the type of movie, such as sequel or standalone. The user will add a column for the platform they watched each movie on, like Amazon Prime or in theaters. The user will add a "Month Watched" column to their movie tracking spreadsheet. The user has their movies written down in a note-taking app for easy copying and pasting into the spreadsheet.
